descriptionShort: Career follow-up on Steve Jaques, former Tri-City Americans defenseman and captain, now with Phoenix Roadrunners.
descriptionLong: Steve Jaques, who served as captain of the Tri-City Americans during the 1989-90 WHL season, spent the 1990-91 season with the Phoenix Roadrunners of the IHL, a Los Angeles Kings farm team. In 58 regular season games, Jaques recorded 10 goals, 24 assists, and 227 penalty minutes; in nine playoff games he had 2 goals, 6 assists, and 21 penalty minutes before Phoenix was eliminated by Peoria in the Turner Cup semifinals.
